title: eDigital Signatures and equote apps are not loading

posts.author: Floris (Floris Geurts)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I seem to have an issue with the edigital signature and equote apps from Eligeo.
After installing the apps they do not seem to work. It seems that the apps are unable to load or connect. I have uninstalled the apps and tried using different browsers but with no succes. Does anyone have experience with this issue?

afbeelding1053×608 13.6 KB

posts.author: samicaracand (Sami Caracand (DocuGen))
posts.cookedHtml:
@Floris
I have good news! We’re releasing e-signatures as a new feature in DocuGen starting next week. With DocuGen Sign you can:

  • Collect verified e-signatures protected by a digital seal (like DocuSign)
  • Send documents to multiple signers
  • Automate document sending using automations

We’re granting access to DocuGen Sign early adopters as soon as next week (10 June.) If you would like access, please fill out this form:
